title: Evidence Scope Field
prompt:
Create a production-ready Evidence Scope Field using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original labelled input lets a reviewer choose one of three evidence scopes: Team, Project, or Organization. The selected scope appears as a dark text field with a compact evidence count, and a small amber marker tracks the selected option below. Use a light Bento composition with white and #F4F5F6 surfaces, #ECECEE borders, 22px rounding, soft shadows, #111111 primary text, and #4A4A4F support copy. Amber is the only bright accent; no gradients on the field or card.

Implement the choices as a labelled radiogroup with native buttons, aria-checked, and a live confirmation sentence. Each button needs a 44px target, a visible 3px focus indicator, and Enter or Space activation. Animate the marker with a spring at stiffness 340 and damping 26, then fade the count in over 140ms ease-out. Use only local deterministic state, no timers, random values, browser storage, remote data, or network calls.

At 320px, maintain clear stacked labels and avoid clipped counts; on a large preview, let the field keep a comfortable maximum width. Preserve logical keyboard order, AA contrast, and labels that explain state without relying only on amber. Honor prefers-reduced-motion by moving the marker immediately and limiting transition to a brief opacity fade. Return complete client code, pure CSS approximation, and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML:
*/ .evidence-scope{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);max-width:340px;border-bottom:4px solid #f2aa30}.evidence-scope button{min-height:44px;border:0;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;color:#111;font-weight:800}.evidence-scope button[aria-checked=true]{background:#f4f5f6}.evidence-scope button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.evidence-scope *{transition:none}}
